rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
Align helper declaration types with actual expression types to avoid type mismatches.
generic_rules: Component type annexes are the standard location for assumptions and guarantees.
AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid within annex blocks.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use boolean expressions for range comparisons in AGREE.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
anti_patterns: Do not assume non-negative bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Do not use Boolean domain values as integers in AGREE expressions.
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
